onComponentTokens.notes: Filled-variant text reads against component fill.

notes: Feedback-banner archetype: time-limited notification banner (peer of alert). Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral each ship a full 8-var slot bundle (accent/icon-color/title-color/soft-bg/filled-bg/filled-fg/outlined-border).
Three SIZES (small/base/large) — categorical, not the 10-density ladder. Sizes drive padding-x/y, gap, content-gap, font-size, title-font-size, icon-size, close-size.
Four variants: default (soft accent bar + tinted bg), filled (solid role bg + on-component fg), outlined (transparent + role border), soft (tinted bg, no accent).
State machine: entering (fade-in) → visible (static) → exiting (fade+scale-out). Driven by data-state attribute + transition-driven CSS animations.
Info is a dedicated palette (blue), DISTINCT from brand. Feedback toasts often coexist with banners; info allows color separation.
Close slot is optional; dismissal is state-driven (.toast[data-state='exiting']), independent of user interaction.
Portal container constrains z-index stack and container gap for multi-toast queuing.
